title: Letter from Chair, CSPL to Richard Lloyd OBE, Chair, IPSA
body: "A letter from Doug Chalmers CB DSO OBE, Chair, Committee on Standards in Public Life to Richard Lloyd OBE, Chair, Independent Parliamentary Standards Authority, responding to IPSA’s 2024 consultation: ‘Supporting trust in democracy in the new Parliament: Consultation on changes to how we regulate and how we publish MPs’ funding’. "
